notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, third baseman Luis Rengifo to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Taylor Trammell out at 2nd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Meyers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop David Hamilton to first baseman Jake Bauers. Braden Shewmake out at 2nd. Jake Meyers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Meyers rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop David Hamilton to first baseman Jake Bauers. Braden Shewmake out at 2nd. Jake Meyers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jeremy Peña pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeremy Peña reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Joey Ortiz.

notableEvents.label: Jeremy Peña reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jeremy Peña reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Joey Ortiz.

notableEvents.label: Christian Vázquez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Abner Uribe intentionally walks Christian Vázquez.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Christian Walker reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Luis Rengifo. Yordan Alvarez to 3rd. Yordan Alvarez advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by third baseman Luis Rengifo.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Luis Rengifo batting, Garrett Mitchell picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Nick Allen.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Vaughn pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Vaughn flies out to right fielder Cam Smith.

notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez pops into a force out, second baseman Nick Allen to shortstop Braden Shewmake. Sal Frelick out at 2nd. Gary Sánchez to 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Jeremy Peña reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Joey Ortiz.
